description: Newfold Digital is a web presence and commerce company that operates a portfolio of hosting, domain, website, and related online-service brands. The newfold.com domain serves primarily as the corporate site for the company.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found for newfold.com itself. Searches surfaced only corporate/marketing pages and legal references to partner APIs for other brands/services, but no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI on newfold.com or its subdomains with developer docs or auth details.
